title: Variated Spawn Eggs
description: This resource pack adds numerous more Spawn Egg textures based off the ones added in the 25w08a snapshot! It only works in snapshot version 25w08a or after.
body:
This resource pack adds numerous more Spawn Egg textures based off the ones added in the 25w08a snapshot! It is meant to show the visual differences of each mob. The way to obtain these eggs are through /give commands with specific [Component Data](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Data_component_format).

To easily use the commands, I recommend using [MCStacker](https://mcstacker.net/?cmd=give) to quickly create and copy/paste the commands in-game.

**TERMS OF USE**
```
You cannot use any of my original assets or resources for commercial use

You can redistribute my assets in your own resource pack as long I receive credit for it in a credits.txt file within the resource pack and on the page it is being hosted

You can use this resource pack within videos or live streams, however a link to my profile would be appreciated
```
Basically, follow the [CC-BY-NC-SA License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/).


**This resource pack only works in Java snapshot version 25w08a (1.21.5) and onward! Please do not use in 1.21.4 and below!**
